title: Lunch Time 午餐时间
scene: 同学们在食堂排队打饭，讨论今天的菜单。

lines.en: What are you having for lunch today, Oliver?
lines.zh: 你今天午饭吃什么，奥利弗？

lines.en: I think I'll get the chicken and rice. It smells great!
lines.zh: 我想吃鸡肉和米饭。闻起来很香！

lines.en: I'm going to try the noodles. They have tomato and egg noodles today.
lines.zh: 我想尝尝面条。今天有番茄鸡蛋面。

lines.en: That sounds delicious! Don't forget to get some vegetables.
lines.zh: 听起来很美味！别忘了吃点蔬菜。

lines.en: You're right. I'll get some broccoli too.
lines.zh: 你说得对。我也要一些西兰花。

lines.en: Do you want to sit together at the window table?
lines.zh: 你想一起坐在靠窗的桌子吗？

lines.en: Sure! Let me grab a bottle of water first.
I'll save you a seat. The line is getting long.
lines.zh: 我给你占个座位。排队的人越来越多了。

lines.en: Thanks! I'll be right there. This lunch looks so good!
lines.zh: 谢谢！我马上过去。这顿午饭看起来太好吃了！

lines.en: I'm so hungry I could eat a horse! Let's eat!
lines.zh: 我饿得能吃下一匹马！我们吃吧！
